title: Foxy’s Cheating Game
description: Zoro and Sanji’s rivalry turns into forced teamwork as they battle the Groggy Monsters for Chopper’s return.
scene: Across pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji. Zoro and Sanji’s rivalry turns into forced teamwork as they battle the Groggy Monsters for Chopper’s return.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: will not lose any energy, but...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's physical velocity will decrease drama-tically!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Anyways, anything it hits will slow down.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: I became the almighty noro-noro man!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Behold! I shall demon-strate my power!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The Commonwealth stopped in mid air?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Damn... so that's why we lost...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: No wonder those bastards were so confident...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: his power clinched the match for them.

dialogue.speaker: Hamburg
dialogue.text: The first match has officially ended.

summary: Zoro and Sanji’s rivalry turns into forced teamwork as they battle the Groggy Monsters for Chopper’s return.
